description: Course/training ad that mentions 'vacancy' and 'jobs' — must be is_job_related: false
subject: Unlock 500+ Tech Vacancies — Join Our Bootcamp Today
raw_text:
Hi there!

Are you struggling to land tech jobs? Our 12-week Python & DevOps Bootcamp has helped 3,000+ graduates land their dream vacancy!

What you'll learn:
- Python, Docker, Kubernetes
- CI/CD pipelines
- Cloud (AWS, GCP)

We guarantee job placement assistance. Our graduates work at Google, Amazon, and hundreds of startups.

Early bird discount: 40% off until June 15!

Enroll now: https://techbootcamp.example.com/enroll

Unsubscribe: https://techbootcamp.example.com/unsubscribe
